features: Welcome to AcademicPulse v1.1.23 — this update brings Live Class tracking to Analytics, fixes the update popup re-appearing after sign-out, and several other improvements.

The Analytics Dashboard now has a dedicated Live Class Analytics section. Any session you log with (live class) anywhere in the notes is automatically counted and tracked separately from regular study sessions.

New analytics for live classes include: Total Classes attended, Total Hours, This Month's count, Average session duration, a Weekly Frequency bar chart (last 8 weeks), and a Per-Subject breakdown with animated progress bars showing which subjects you attend the most live classes for.

Live classes also appear in a separate 🎥 Live Classes tab in Global Search, grouped neatly by subject with total hours and class count per subject. The (live class) tag is automatically stripped from displayed notes to keep things clean.
🐛 Bug Fix — Update Popup After Sign-Out

Fixed a bug where installing an update, signing out, and signing back in would show the update popup again. The app now stamps the installed version locally on the device (separate from cloud data), so even if the cloud sync restores an older system state, the update notification will never re-appear for a version you've already installed.
As part of this fix, installing an update now immediately triggers a cloud sync so your updated version state is pushed to the cloud right away.
Session durations in the Recent Sessions table on the Dashboard now correctly display in hours and minutes (e.g. 1h 30m) instead of the old MM:SS format which looked like minutes.
